mapper.sql: id, activity_id, source_type, baseline_code, vehicle_node_code, part_code, software_build_version_id, critical, ota, install_seq, parallel_group, group_no, force_upgrade, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_activity_upgrade_target ( id, activity_id, source_type, baseline_code, vehicle_node_code, part_code, software_build_version_id, critical, ota, install_seq, parallel_group, group_no, force_upgrade, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{activityId}, #{sourceType}, #{baselineCode}, #{vehicleNodeCode}, #{partCode}, #{softwareBuildVersionId}, #{critical}, #{ota}, #{installSeq}, #{parallelGroup}, #{groupNo}, #{forceUpgrade}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_activity_upgrade_target ( id, activity_id, source_type, baseline_code, vehicle_node_code, part_code, software_build_version_id, critical, ota, install_seq, parallel_group, group_no, force_upgrade, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.activityId}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.baselineCode}, #{item.vehicleNodeCode}, #{item.partCode}, #{item.softwareBuildVersionId}, #{item.critical}, #{item.ota}, #{item.installSeq}, #{item.parallelGroup}, #{item.groupNo}, #{item.forceUpgrade}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_activity_upgrade_target t SET
t.activity_id = #{activityId},
t.source_type = #{sourceType},
t.baseline_code = #{baselineCode},
t.vehicle_node_code = #{vehicleNodeCode},
t.part_code = #{partCode},
t.software_build_version_id = #{softwareBuildVersionId},
t.critical = #{critical},
t.ota = #{ota},
t.install_seq = #{installSeq},
t.parallel_group = #{parallelGroup},
t.group_no = #{groupNo},
t.force_upgrade = #{forceUpgrade},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_activity_upgrade_target t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_activity_upgrade_target t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_activity_upgrade_target t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_activity_upgrade_target t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.activity_id = #{activityId}
SELECT FROM tb_activity_upgrade_target t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY t.install_seq ASC, t.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_activity_upgrade_target t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.activity_id = #{activityId}
